Skip to contents
survtrans 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Survtrans

The goal of survtrans is to …

Installation

You can install the development version of survtrans from GitHub with:

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("SignorinoY/survtrans")

Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

library(survtrans)
#> 载入需要的程辑包：survode
#> 载入需要的程辑包：survival
library(survode)
## basic example code
fit_src <- survode(Surv(time, status) ~ ., data = sim1_src, df = 10)
cv_survtrans(sim1_trg, fit_src, penalty = "SCAD")
#> $coefficients
#> $coefficients$gamma
#> [1] 3.7
#> 
#> $coefficients$beta
#>         X1         X2         X3         X4         X5         X6         X7 
#> -0.5262577  1.5686763 -0.9953343  1.0047907 -0.9479981  1.0413994 -1.0320179 
#>         X8         X9        X10 
#>  0.9215155 -0.9986449  1.0025988 
#> 
#> $coefficients$eta
#>  [1] 0.4773697 0.5116750 0.0000000 0.0000000 0.0760290 0.0000000 0.0000000
#>  [8] 0.0000000 0.0000000 0.0000000
#> 
#> $coefficients$penalty
#> [1] "SCAD"
#> 
#> $coefficients$lambda
#> [1] 0.1110202
#> 
#> $coefficients$formula
#> Surv(time, status) ~ .
#> <environment: 0x1108b7a20>
#> 
#> 
#> $lambdas
#>   [1] 3.089203e-01 2.814767e-01 2.564711e-01 2.336869e-01 2.129268e-01
#>   [6] 1.940110e-01 1.767756e-01 1.610713e-01 1.467622e-01 1.337242e-01
#>  [11] 1.218445e-01 1.110202e-01 1.011575e-01 9.217093e-02 8.398272e-02
#>  [16] 7.652192e-02 6.972393e-02 6.352984e-02 5.788603e-02 5.274359e-02
#>  [21] 4.805800e-02 4.378866e-02 3.989859e-02 3.635411e-02 3.312451e-02
#>  [26] 3.018182e-02 2.750055e-02 2.505748e-02 2.283144e-02 2.080316e-02
#>  [31] 1.895506e-02 1.727115e-02 1.573683e-02 1.433881e-02 1.306499e-02
#>  [36] 1.190433e-02 1.084678e-02 9.883186e-03 9.005191e-03 8.205195e-03
#>  [41] 7.476268e-03 6.812097e-03 6.206929e-03 5.655523e-03 5.153102e-03
#>  [46] 4.695314e-03 4.278195e-03 3.898132e-03 3.551833e-03 3.236298e-03

Code of Conduct

Please note that the survtrans project is released with a Contributor Code of Conduct. By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.
